description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named JARVIS-Tools github action that runs on push and pull request events. Use an ubuntu-latest job matrix to test with Python 3.9 and 3.10. For each Python version, check out the repository, set up Python, install dependencies with pip, run flake8, pycodestyle, and pydocstyle checks, install numpy, scipy, and matplotlib, and run pytest with coverage and codecov.
